description_long: This kiosk consists of two main booth-like structures and a smaller standalone unit, all featuring a modern, boxy design. The two larger kiosks have open fronts with recessed service counters and a black interior, while the exteriors are clad in a beige material with black rear panels. Each of the larger kiosks has a flat roof with two circular yellow elements, possibly lights or vents, visible from above. The smaller unit is a simple rectangular box with a metallic or light gray finish, likely serving as a storage or auxiliary counter. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or plazas. The design emphasizes accessibility and visibility, with no visible doors or windows, and minimal decorative elements.
description: A pair of modern, open-front kiosks with beige and black finishes, accompanied by a smaller gray auxiliary unit. The kiosks feature flat roofs with circular yellow details and recessed service counters.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the kiosks and the smaller auxiliary unit aligned in a row.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open service counters of the two main kiosks and the plain face of the smaller unit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and alignment of all three units.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid black backs of the two kiosks and the plain back of the smaller unit.
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with two circular yellow elements on each main kiosk, no overhangs or decorative features
